name: workbench
description: Portable agent workbench: codebase mastery, research, skill recommendations, skill distillation, memory capture, and prompt translation.

interface.shortDescription: Portable codebase mastery, research, memory, prompting, skill-advice, and skill-distillation workflows.
interface.longDescription: A portable workbench for Codex and other coding agents: codebase mastery mode, deep research reports, quick scans, installed-skill recommendations, workflow-to-skill distillation, prompt translation, and session memory capture. Codex loads these as bundled skills; other runtimes can expose their own adapters.
defaultPrompt: DEVOUR this codebase before we change it.
Run a quick research scan on this topic.
Recommend the best installed skill for this task.
Distill this workflow into a reusable skill.
Turn this feedback into a coding-agent prompt.
